IMPACT_FRAMES.SettingElemFromWeaponHint: When enabled, the element is determined by the weapon's damage type (fire → fire, cold → ice, lightning, necrotic → shadow, etc.). Overrides random/fixed selection. Physical damage types (slashing, piercing, bludgeoning) show no element.
IMPACT_FRAMES.SettingOnlyOwnerHint: Show animation only on the client that rolled the attack.
